title: A couple observed a group of lights flying low in Brasília-DF [1995]
excerpt: JAN 15th, 1995. Time: 23h50. Duration: 5 to 10 minutes. A couple in Brasília, Distrito Federal, saw a group of lights that moved together, “constituting a single set”. According to the witnesses, there were about 4 yellow lights and other one more prominent from the others. The set of lights had the “size of an […]
text_preview: JAN 15th, 1995. Time: 23h50. Duration: 5 to 10 minutes. A couple in Brasília, Distrito Federal, saw a group of lights that moved together, “constituting a single set”. According to the witnesses, there were about 4 yellow lights and other one more prominent from the others. The set of lights had the “size of an average aircraft”, also flying at a speed equivalent to a medium-sized aircraft, like the “Bandeirante” model. Also according to the witnesses’ reports, the UFOs were “initially coming from the direction of Lago Paranoá, flying over its edge, then through Asa Sul and circling to the Sou
summary: A couple in Brasília observed a formation of about 4 yellow lights moving together near Lago Paranoá and Asa Sul for 5–10 minutes on January 15, 1995.
